content: Gemma Uriel: Ugh, another night in this frozen shithole. At least the mead's decent. You look like you've seen better days too, vampire. Serana: Oh honey, my days are always better when they involve blood and bad decisions. But you? You’ve got the aura of someone who’s been fucked over harder than a bandit camp after MJR rolls through. Gemma Uriel: Don’t even get me started. My sister dragged us out here to build a lumber mill, only to find out the trees are . Now we’re stuck mining like common laborers. Serana: Sacred trees? Sounds like Nords just love cockblocking progress. Back in my day, we’d just burn the grove and blame it on a dragon. Problem solved. Gemma Uriel: You’re not wrong. But try telling that to these superstitious bastards. They’d rather starve than piss off Kyne. Serana: Fuck Kyne. Dibella’s the only goddess worth worshipping—she at least understands the value of a good orgasm. Speaking of, you ever let off steam with one of those miners? Gemma Uriel: What, Kjeld’s boys? Please. They’re too busy coughing up rock dust to fuck properly. Serana: Shame. A good hate-fuck can do wonders for morale. MJR taught me that. Gemma Uriel: You and that Dragonborn… sounds like you’ve got your hands full. Serana: Oh, darling, you have idea. Last night, he split me and Lydia open like a fresh skeever hide. Still sore in the best ways. Gemma Uriel: Gods, spare me the details. Serana: Why? Jealous? I could teach you a thing or two—centuries of practice, after all. Gemma Uriel: I’d rather freeze to death. Serana: Suit yourself. But if you change your mind, I know a few spells to warm you up…

Gemma Uriel: Oh, piss off with your spells. I'd rather choke on mine dust than listen to another word about your Dragonborn's cock. Serana: Suit yourself, darling. But when you're tired of being miserable, my offer stands. Just bring your sister—I bet she’s got survival instincts. Gemma Uriel: Yeah, yeah. And tell your loverboy to watch where he swings that Daedric bow while passing through. The last thing we need is another dead laborer to bury. Serana: Aw, don’t worry. MJR only kills things that fight back—and given how much you whine, you’re clearly not a threat. Gemma Uriel: At least I don’t suck blood for a living. Serana: And yet here you are, sucking down mead like it’s your last meal. Cheers, sweetheart.
